meta.project: Academia de Natación (Swimming Academy Management System)

product_overview: A web application for managing a swimming academy’s core operations from a single admin interface. It lets the admin log in, review dashboard stats, and manage students, instructors, classes, enrollments, payments, and attendance records.
core_goals: Log in to access the academy management system
Review high-level academy statistics from the dashboard
Create, search, edit, and delete student records
Create, search, edit, and delete instructor records
Create, view, edit, and delete swim classes
Create, view, update status, and delete enrollments
Register, view, filter, and delete payments
Register, view, filter, and delete attendance records
Log out of the system safely

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows the admin to sign in with email and password to access protected areas of the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an invalid credentials message

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: Shows summary counts for students, instructors, classes, and active enrollments, with quick access to the main sections.
user_flows: Log in -> Navigate to /dashboard -> View summary stat cards -> Use a quick access link to open a management section

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Lets the admin search students, create new student records, update existing records, and remove students when needed.
user_flows: Navigate to /estudiantes -> Search by name or email -> Review the filtered student list

Navigate to /estudiantes -> Open the new student form -> Enter nombre -> Enter fecha_nacimiento -> Optionally enter telefono -> Optionally enter email -> Save the student -> Return to the student list
Navigate to /estudiantes -> Open a student for editing -> Update the student details -> Save the changes -> Return to the updated student list
Navigate to /estudiantes -> Choose a student to delete -> Confirm the deletion -> See the student removed from the list
Navigate to /estudiantes -> Move between pages -> Review additional student records

features.name: Instructor Management
features.description: Lets the admin search instructors, create and update instructor profiles, and delete instructors when required.
user_flows: Navigate to /instructores -> Search by name -> Review the filtered instructor list
Navigate to /instructores -> Open the new instructor form -> Enter nombre -> Optionally enter especialidad -> Optionally enter email -> Save the instructor -> Return to the instructor list
Navigate to /instructores -> Open an instructor for editing -> Update the instructor details -> Save the changes -> Return to the updated instructor list
Navigate to /instructores -> Choose an instructor to delete -> Confirm the deletion -> See the instructor removed from the list

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Allows the admin to view swim classes and create or update class records with level and instructor assignments.
user_flows: Navigate to /clases -> Review the class list with level, instructor, and capacity details
Navigate to /clases -> Open the new class form -> Enter nombre_clase -> Select a level -> Select an instructor -> Enter cupo -> Save the class -> Return to the class list
Navigate to /clases -> Open a class for editing -> Update the class details -> Save the changes -> Return to the updated class list
Navigate to /clases -> Choose a class to delete -> Confirm the deletion -> See the class removed from the list

features.name: Enrollment Management
features.description: Lets the admin create enrollments, filter them by status, change enrollment status inline, and remove enrollments.
user_flows: Navigate to /inscripciones -> Filter enrollments by estado -> Review the matching enrollment list
Navigate to /inscripciones -> Open the new enrollment form -> Select a student -> Select a class -> Set fecha_inscripcion -> Choose estado -> Save the enrollment -> Return to the enrollment list
Navigate to /inscripciones -> Change an enrollment status from the list -> Review the updated status
Navigate to /inscripciones -> Choose an enrollment to delete -> Confirm the deletion -> See the enrollment removed from the list

features.name: Payment Management
features.description: Lets the admin register payments for enrollments, filter payment records by status, and remove payment entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /pagos -> Filter payments by estado -> Review the matching payment list
Navigate to /pagos -> Open the payment form -> Select an enrollment -> Enter monto -> Select metodo_pago -> Set fecha_pago -> Choose estado -> Save the payment -> Return to the payment list
Navigate to /pagos -> Choose a payment to delete -> Confirm the deletion -> See the payment removed from the list

features.name: Attendance Management
features.description: Lets the admin record attendance for enrolled students, filter attendance by date, and delete attendance entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /asistencias -> Filter attendance by date -> Review the matching attendance list
Navigate to /asistencias -> Open the attendance form -> Select an active enrollment -> Pick fecha_clase -> Choose whether the student asistio -> Save the attendance -> Return to the attendance list
Navigate to /asistencias -> Choose an attendance record to delete -> Confirm the deletion -> See the attendance record removed from the list

features.name: Logout
features.description: Ends the current admin session and returns the user to the login page.
user_flows: From any protected page, use the logout action -> Return to /login

tech_stack.other: Angular Reactive Forms, Angular Router, HttpClient, Laravel Sanctum (Bearer token auth)

routes.description: Login page with email and password
Dashboard with stats cards and quick access links
List of students with search and pagination
Form to create a new student
Form to edit an existing student
List of instructors with search and pagination
Form to create a new instructor
Form to edit an existing instructor
Form to create a new class with level and instructor dropdowns
Form to edit an existing class
List of enrollments with status filter
Form to create a new enrollment
List of payments with status filter
Form to register a new payment
List of attendance records with date filter
Form to register attendance for an enrollment

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password using Laravel Sanctum token auth
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: Shows total counts of students, instructors, classes and enrollments
user_interactions: Click quick access links to navigate to sections

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Full CRUD for students with search, pagination, and delete confirmation
user_interactions: Search students by name or email
Click Nuevo estudiante to open create form
Fill nombre, fecha_nacimiento, telefono, email fields
Click pencil icon to edit a student
Click trash icon and confirm to delete a student
Navigate between pages with pagination buttons

features.name: Instructor Management
user_interactions: Click Nuevo instructor to open create form
Click trash icon and confirm to delete

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Full CRUD for swim classes with level and instructor selection
user_interactions: Click trash icon and confirm to delete

features.name: Enrollment Management
features.description: Create and manage student enrollments in classes with status control
user_interactions: Filter enrollments by status (Activo, Suspendido, Baja)
Change enrollment status via inline dropdown
Click trash icon and confirm to delete

features.name: Payment Management
features.description: Register and list payments for enrollments
user_interactions: Filter payments by status (Pagado, Pendiente, Vencido)
Click trash icon and confirm to delete

features.name: Attendance Management
features.description: Record and list student attendance per class session
user_interactions: Select Si or No radio button for attendance
Click trash icon and confirm to delete

features.name: Logout
features.description: Log out and clear session token
